title: Reference Wooden Sports Shadowbox Transform AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Wooden Sports Shadowbox Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image ultra-premium handcrafted wooden masterpiece poster for football athlete with trophy reference before handcrafted wooden diorama poster transformation, transforming fictional trophy-lifting football captain from the source image into a museum-grade carved wooden legacy artwork. Subject: fictional trophy-lifting football captain from the source image is recreated as a highly detailed carved wooden sculpture while preserving the uploaded source pose, expression, outfit, trophies, medals, and sporting spirit. Scene: Luxury wooden shadow-box diorama surrounded by trophies, medals, stars, stadium atmosphere, cheering crowds, championship banners, laurel wreaths, football motifs, and career highlights, built from multiple layers of carved walnut, oak, maple, and mahogany with trophy-room atmosphere. Composition: Preserve the uploaded image composition, athlete silhouette, pose logic, expression, outfit placement, trophies, medals, and overall legacy structure, then rebuild the scene as dimensional carved relief inside a premium vertical 4:5 poster frame. Signature Elements: Preserved reference wooden sports shadowbox transform source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Master artisan woodworking exhibition quality with realistic wood grain, polished surfaces, engraved details, ornamental borders, museum-grade bas-relief, heirloom finishing, luxury sports memorabilia energy, and collector edition presentation. Color Palette: Fixed believable walnut, oak, maple, mahogany, deep carved shadows, warm gold illumination, rich brown wood tones, and subtle trophy-room highlights; Lighting: Warm cinematic golden glow, dramatic carved shadows, edge highlights on polished wood grain, trophy-room illumination, and dimensional relief depth. Materials: Layered carved walnut, oak, maple, mahogany, polished stained wood, engraved plaques, carved ornamental frame, bas-relief trophies, and realistic wood-fiber surface detail. Typography: CARVED GLORY appears as engraved title text on the wooden frame or lower plaque, with clean readable carved lettering. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
